text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, Digital... There's something I've<n>been
meaning to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hwaughhh! You have a question for me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm an open book! Please ask me<n>anything you
want!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay, thank you! I was wondering...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You looked really excited when you said<n>"This is
totally going in the next<n>volume!" So tell me, what
is it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: GASP! I... I can't believe... You mean I...said that out loud?! Don't tell me I wasspeaking the whole time?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Are The Secret Race and The Feel ofYour Tail popular manga right now? Orare they training books or something?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
HNNNGGG... You even know... the<n>titles! N-no
more... I'm... dying of cringe!
